research_question: Using the execution-date current S&P 500 Top 50 company snapshot as a fixed historical pool, does one frozen 12-1 momentum portfolio justify later strict PIT validation?
null_hypothesis: The frozen momentum portfolio fails at least one mechanical discovery gate versus the contemporaneous qualified fixed-current-universe equal-weight benchmark.
known_biases: The current constituent snapshot is backfilled over history and therefore has explicit survivorship and look-ahead universe bias.
Yahoo adjusted history is retrieved currently and is not represented as historically point-in-time available.
This is one full-sample discovery with no validation, holdout, alpha, p-value, or inference claim.

universe.identity: Execution-date current S&P 500 Top 50 companies disclosed through XLG, frozen once and backfilled unchanged over the full discovery history.

official_primary.identity_derivation: The exact API template, locale, CUSIP 46137V233, and idType=cusip are disclosed in the same-day official XLG page bytes.

maintained_public_fallback.allowed_only_if: The official response is HTTP 200 and exposes fund identity, holding count, and at least five top holding symbols/weights but is not fully machine-readable.

universe.instrument_filter: US-listed ordinary common-stock lines only; exclude cash, derivatives, funds, preferred shares, warrants, rights, and non-equity rows.
universe.company_grouping: Normalize official issuer name by case/punctuation and remove only a terminal Class A/B/C share-class suffix; any other ambiguous grouping fails closed.
universe.multi_class_rule: For a company with multiple ordinary lines, retain the line with higher median raw-close times volume over the latest 60 complete common Yahoo sessions as of the frozen snapshot; ties or fewer than 60 common sessions fail closed.

prices.evaluation_end: Latest complete session common to primary and cross-check data, no later than the last completed New York trading date at retrieval.

primary.semantics: Yahoo raw OHLC/volume plus current-retrieval adjusted close; adjusted fields are retrospective discovery data, not PIT.

crosscheck.semantics: Raw daily close used only for the frozen level cross-check; never fused into primary history.

transport_order: Stooq cross-check for the same symbol
prices.crosscheck_gate: For each qualified symbol, at least 98% of overlapping raw-close observations must have absolute relative difference <=0.5%; unresolved symbols are quarantined and more than 5 unresolved symbols yields INPUT_BLOCKED.

signal_and_portfolio.formation: Last available primary session of each calendar month after close.
signal_and_portfolio.execution: Next primary session close; new weights apply to subsequent close-to-close returns.
signal_and_portfolio.qualification: At formation, a symbol needs current and lagged adjusted closes at t-21 and t-252 and an execution-date adjusted close; each evaluation month requires at least 30 qualified stock lines.
signal_and_portfolio.ranking: Descending signal with symbol ascending as the outcome-independent tie-break.
signal_and_portfolio.selection: Retain existing holdings ranked 1 through 15, then fill by rank until exactly 10 names are held.
signal_and_portfolio.trade_notional: Sum absolute stock-weight changes from drifted pre-trade weights to targets; cost equals one-way bps times trade notional.
signal_and_portfolio.annual_turnover: Exclude initial entry; annualized one-way turnover is one half of subsequent absolute stock-weight changes divided by elapsed years.

benchmark.primary: At each strategy formation, equal weight all contemporaneously qualified, non-quarantined lines from the frozen current-company pool; rebalance at the same next-session close.
benchmark.costs: Apply the same base and stress one-way cost conventions as the strategy.

metrics.cagr: Geometric annual growth over actual elapsed days from the first common execution.
metrics.volatility: Sample standard deviation of daily net returns times sqrt(252).
metrics.sharpe: Mean daily net return divided by sample standard deviation times sqrt(252), zero risk-free rate.
metrics.max_drawdown: Minimum equity divided by prior running maximum minus one.
metrics.subperiod_relative_sign: Sign of geometric strategy base-net return minus benchmark base-net return within each frozen calendar segment.

outcome_may_be_opened_only_after: all price source bytes and source identities frozen
smoke and central data gates passed

central_data.writer_entry: quant_system.data.writer.append_rows through the existing transaction and .writer.lock protocol
prewrite_sequence: conflicting replay rejection with unchanged copy
existing writer lock and transaction append
central_data.fail_closed: If existing tables cannot carry the frozen rows or any write gate fails, do not migrate; return INPUT_BLOCKED and keep the canonical database unchanged.

forbidden: fundamentals, industry, valuation, news, or ML
optimizer, intraday data, options, hedges, second strategy, parameter search, or third price source
